style: bubblegum pastel hype — light cream background, soft pink / lavender / mint pastels, chunky display type with bouncy overshoot, floating blob shapes, confetti starburst pops, rotating sticker badges. The ONLY black element is the notch island pill (brand anchor) that things pop out of. High energy, fast beats, sticker/zine aesthetic — deliberately NOT a dark-mode dev template.
font: Bricolage Grotesque (display, self-hosted woff2) + Space Grotesk (small text, self-hosted woff2)

customize.note: Hand-authored: brief hard-requires a bespoke pastel sticker look plus a custom notch-pill motif (mic flip, agent dots) that no caption-* block covers. Motion primitives reused from motion-vocabulary: scale_punch, slam, bounce_in, word_reveal, scale_pulse, underline_sweep.

scenes.motion: scale_punch per word (back.out overshoot) on pink field, notch pill drops in above, confetti pop on land
slam from top with squash-and-stretch, lavender field, blobs drift
elastic scale-in huge + starburst rays + confetti explosion + scale_pulse on beat, mint field, rotating sticker badge 'WOW'
notch pill center-top; mic glyph pops out and flips grey->red LIVE dot; words bounce_in below; red underline_sweep
word INVISIBLE ghosts in from blur/transparent (fade_blur) then solidifies; script lines slide out of the notch pill like a teleprompter
three green agent dots pop out of the notch pill with stagger (back.out), tiny terminal ticks; words scale_punch

scenes.text: NotchControls — Your notch, now a cockpit. — Free on GitHub
scenes.motion: cream field; notch pill lands center with squash; wordmark scale_punch; tagline word_reveal; 'Free on GitHub' pill badge bounce_in + hold_breath; confetti settle
